response.justification: The candidate lacks direct C++ experience in industrial automation or high-performance systems, with most roles centered on JavaScript/TypeScript, DLang, and web technologies; there is no evidence of STL, multi-threading, message brokers, IEC 62443, or industrial protocol exposure required for the role.
strengths: Strong full-stack and cross-platform development experience
Proven ability to build and document complex systems (e.g., GISCollective)
Active contributor to open-source and technical education initiatives
concerns: Minimal to no recent C++ or STL usage in professional context
No demonstrated experience with industrial cybersecurity standards or IoT protocols (MQTT/Modbus/OPC UA)
Lacks cloud or on-prem industrial automation platform exposure
